_bootstrapNote: Bootstrapped on PLA-603. lastSyncedTag is the latest upstream tag that's an ancestor of fork master (git merge-base origin/master upstream/master → 685ee84, closest preceding upstream tag v2026.428.0). ETag from upstream releases/latest at bootstrap time (then pointing at v2026.525.0) so the first scheduled tick gets a 304 and exits no-op. Sibling B's first non-dry-run tick will see ETag-mismatch on the next release and drive the first real sync; until then, dry-runs report 'no-op: still at v2026.428.0'.
